creator: exgande@gmail.com
text:
Greetings from Colombia I have the same issue with CodeBlocks version 16.01 in my TrueOS based on freebsd current 12.0

09:36:33: Error: Cannot convert from the charset 'Unknown encoding (-1)'!
Starting Code::Blocks Release 16.01  rev 10692 Apr 19 2017, 12:15:35 - wx2.8.12 (FreeBSD, unicode) - 64 bit
Initialize EditColourSet .....
Initialize EditColourSet: done.
Abortar

Thaks for you help !!
